messages.content: Plan this out. I want to ship a beta to my 2 design partners within 6 weeks.

project.title: HR Copilot
project.one_liner: AI tool for HR teams at SMBs to automate job description writing and screening questions
project.target_user: HR managers at companies with 50-200 employees
project.core_problem: HR at SMBs spend 4-6 hours writing job descriptions and screening questions for each role — mostly copied and lightly edited from previous postings

success_criteria.criterion: Both design partners actively using to draft JDs within 2 weeks of beta
JD draft to final approval time under 30 minutes (vs 4h manual)
At least 1 design partner willing to pay $200/mo after beta

scope_items.description: Job description generator from role title + seniority + key responsibilities
Screening question set generator (5-10 questions per JD)
